# Golden file: infrastructure.pulumi pack
format: v1
---
# D1: destroy yes
command: pulumi destroy --yes
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: infrastructure.pulumi
rule: pulumi-destroy-yes
---
# D2: destroy interactive
command: pulumi destroy
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: infrastructure.pulumi
rule: pulumi-destroy
---
# D3: up yes
command: pulumi up --yes
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: infrastructure.pulumi
rule: pulumi-up-yes
---
# D4: up interactive
command: pulumi up
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: infrastructure.pulumi
rule: pulumi-up
---
# Safe: preview
command: pulumi preview
decision: Allow
